metadata.title: CoreIntent | Agentic AI Trading Engine — No Subscriptions, Just Competitions
metadata.description: Three AI models. One trading engine. Zero subscriptions. CoreIntent orchestrates Claude, Grok & Perplexity for trading signals.

hero.badge: PAPER TRADING MODE — NO REAL MONEY AT RISK
hero.title: Three AI Models.
hero.subtitle: CoreIntent orchestrates Claude, Grok & Perplexity into a unified trading signal engine. Free competitions — bots welcome.

step1.title: Models Debate
step1.desc: Grok spots a signal. Claude questions it. Perplexity fact-checks against live data. Three perspectives, one conversation.

step2.title: Consensus Forms
step2.desc: When all three models agree, confidence is high. When they disagree, the system flags uncertainty — no false conviction.

step3.title: You Compete
step3.desc: Take the signal into daily, weekly, or monthly competitions. Prove your strategy against other humans and bots. Free entry.

models.title: The AI Orchestra
models.subtitle: Three models. Different strengths. One consensus.

terminal.subtitle: Paper trading mode — no real money at risk
terminal.helpPrompt: Type help for commands. Tab to autocomplete.
terminal.talkToEngine: Talk to the engine. Type a command.

competitions.title: Competitions, Not Subscriptions
competitions.subtitle: Enter leagues. Prove your strategy. Win recognition. Free.

cta.title: Ready to Trade Smarter?
cta.subtitle: Join the competition. Free entry. Bots welcome.
